name: Rajwada Palace
description: A historic seven-story palace of the Holkar dynasty, Rajwada is a stunning blend of Maratha, Mughal, and French architectural styles.
history: Originally built by Malhar Rao Holkar in 1747. It has burned down three times in its history, with the most recent reconstruction completed in 2006.
famousFor: Holkar heritage and Light & Sound show.
